title: Winston Churchill becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Sir Winston Leonard Spencer Churchill was a British statesman, military officer, and writer who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1940 to 1945, during the Second World War, and again from 1951 to 1955.

title: Keir Starmer becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Sir Keir Rodney Starmer is a British politician and lawyer who has served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom since 2024 and as Leader of the Labour Party since 2020.

title: Margaret Thatcher becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Margaret Hilda Thatcher, Baroness Thatcher, was a British stateswoman who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1979 to 1990 and Leader of the Conservative Party from 1975 to 1990.

title: Rishi Sunak becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Rishi Sunak is a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and Leader of the Conservative Party from 2022 to 2024.

title: Tony Blair becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Sir Anthony Charles Lynton Blair is a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1997 to 2007 and Leader of the Labour Party from 1994 to 2007.

title: Boris Johnson becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Alexander Boris de Pfeffel Johnson is a British politician and writer who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and Leader of the Conservative Party from 2019 to 2022.

title: Liz Truss becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Mary Elizabeth Truss is a British politician who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and Leader of the Conservative Party from September to October 2022.

title: Harold Wilson becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: James Harold Wilson, Baron Wilson of Rievaulx, was a British politician who twice served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, from 1964 to 1970 and from 1974 to 1976.

title: David Cameron becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: David William Donald Cameron, Baron Cameron of Chipping Norton, is a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 2010 to 2016.

title: Neville Chamberlain becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Arthur Neville Chamberlain was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from May 1937 to May 1940 and Leader of the Conservative Party from May 1937 to October 1940.

title: John Major becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Sir John Major is a British retired politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and Leader of the Conservative Party from 1990 to 1997.

title: Anthony Eden becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Robert Anthony Eden, 1st Earl of Avon, was a British politician and military officer who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and Leader of the Conservative Party from 1955 until his resignation in 1957.

title: Gordon Brown becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: James Gordon Brown is a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and Leader of the Labour Party from 2007 to 2010.

title: Theresa May becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Theresa Mary May, Baroness May of Maidenhead, is a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom and Leader of the Conservative Party from 2016 to 2019.

title: Clement Attlee becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Clement Richard Attlee, 1st Earl Attlee, was a British statesman who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1945 to 1951 and Leader of the Labour Party from 1935 to 1955.

title: Benjamin Disraeli becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Benjamin Disraeli, 1st Earl of Beaconsfield, was a British statesman, Conservative politician and writer who twice served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.

title: Edward Heath becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Sir Edward Richard George Heath was a British politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1970 to 1974 and Leader of the Conservative Party from 1965 to 1975.

title: Harold Macmillan becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Maurice Harold Macmillan, 1st Earl of Stockton, was a British statesman and Conservative politician who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1957 to 1963.

title: David Lloyd George becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: David Lloyd George, 1st Earl Lloyd-George of Dwyfor was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1916 to 1922.

title: James Callaghan becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Leonard James Callaghan, Baron Callaghan of Cardiff, was a British statesman who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1976 to 1979 and Leader of the Labour Party from 1976 to 1980.

title: William Pitt the Younger becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: William Pitt was a British statesman who served as the last prime minister of Great Britain from 1783 until the Acts of Union 1800, and the first official prime minister of the United Kingdom from January 1801.

title: H. H. Asquith becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Herbert Henry Asquith, 1st Earl of Oxford and Asquith was a British statesman who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1908 to 1916.

title: William Ewart Gladstone becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: William Ewart Gladstone was a British statesman and Liberal politician, starting as Conservative MP for Newark and later becoming the leader of the Liberal Party.

title: Alec Douglas-Home becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Alexander Frederick Douglas-Home, Baron Home of the Hirsel, known as Lord Dunglass from 1918 to 1951 and the Earl of Home from 1951 to 1963, was a British statesman and Conservative politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1963 to 1964.

title: Robert Peel becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Sir Robert Peel, 2nd Baronet, was a British Conservative statesman who twice was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom, and simultaneously was Chancellor of the Exchequer (1834–1835).

title: Stanley Baldwin becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Stanley Baldwin, 1st Earl Baldwin of Bewdley, was a British statesman and Conservative politician who was prominent in the political leadership of the United Kingdom between the world wars.

title: Arthur Balfour becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Arthur James Balfour, 1st Earl of Balfour, was a British statesman and Conservative politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1902 to 1905.

title: Robert Walpole becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Robert Walpole, 1st Earl of Orford, known between 1725 and 1742 as Sir Robert Walpole, was a British Whig statesman who is generally regarded as the de facto first Prime Minister of Great Britain, serving from 1721 to 1742.

title: Ramsay MacDonald becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: James Ramsay MacDonald was a British statesman and politician who served as Prime Minister of the United Kingdom.

title: Charles Grey, 2nd Earl Grey becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Charles Grey, 2nd Earl Grey was a British Whig politician who served as prime minister of the United Kingdom from 1830 to 1834.

title: William Pitt, 1st Earl of Chatham becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: William Pitt, 1st Earl of Chatham was a British Whig statesman who served as Prime Minister of Great Britain from 1766 to 1768.

title: Bonar Law becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Andrew Bonar Law was a British statesman and politician who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from October 1922 to May 1923.

title: Spencer Perceval becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Spencer Perceval was a British statesman and barrister who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from October 1809 until his assassination in May 1812.

title: John Russell, 1st Earl Russell becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: John Russell, 1st Earl Russell, known as Lord John Russell before 1861, was a British Whig and Liberal statesman who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1846 to 1852 and again from 1865 to 1866.

title: George Canning becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: George Canning was a British Tory statesman.

title: Henry Campbell-Bannerman becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Sir Henry Campbell-Bannerman was a British statesman and Liberal Party politician who was Prime Minister of the United Kingdom from 1905 to 1908 and Leader of the Liberal Party from 1899 to 1908.

title: John Stuart, 3rd Earl of Bute becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: John Stuart, 3rd Earl of Bute, styled Lord Mount Stuart between 1713 and 1723, was a British Tory statesman who served as the Prime Minister of Great Britain from 1762 to 1763 under George III.

title: George Grenville becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: George Grenville was a British Whig statesman who served as Prime Minister of Great Britain, during the early reign of the young George III.

title: Henry Pelham becomes prime minister of the United Kingdom
fact: Henry Pelham was a British Whig statesman who served as Prime Minister of Great Britain from 1743 until his death in 1754.
